comment: MF velocity layer only. Filenames split between 'MF ' (uppercase,
lower octaves) and 'Mf ' (mixed case, upper octaves) — filePatterns
tries MF first then falls back to Mf. Space encoded as %20 in the
pattern so the URL is RFC-valid and the per-sample `file` field
transpose:0.5 because the filename convention is one octave below the
actual sounding pitch (verified against the SFZ patch: 'MF A3.flac' is
mapped to pitch_keycenter=069, i.e. MIDI A4 = 440 Hz, not A3 = 220 Hz).
Inverse of the FatBoy drawbar transpose:2 convention. Without this the
analyzer's ±5%-of-labeled refineFundamentalPeriod locks onto the period-
doubled sub-harmonic of the autocorrelation and writes freq= half of the
true fundamental, which makes the runtime play every key an octave high.
